subject: A4: Build scripts/tests/ scaffold + 15 unit tests
description: pytest-style harness in scripts/tests/. First batch covers F18, F59a (FF7297 case), G2 demotion, VP-Q4 PO-zero, F70 switchover, R1 OTB detection, F30 zero-history guard, F66 customer bias, calendar event boosts, classify() routing, snap() rounding, F58 comment parsing, F19 inactive floor, F38f buyability, _get_event_boosts.
